rows.label: qev051003_MSG0001
rows.name: Ngh... grrrgh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0002
rows.name: Nngh! You're...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0003
rows.name:
...[ST:playername ], is it? Heh... You've caught
me in a rather pathetic state.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0004
rows.name:
I came out here with the completed Adamantine Sword
to hunt down native creatures, but... Growth forces
ambushed me in the middle of my battle...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0005
rows.name:
Haha... Reality is a cruel thing... Even a
genius's techniques are completely useless
when faced with overwhelming numbers...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev051003_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask if the Adamantine Sword broke again.

rows.label: qev051003_JNK0020
rows.name: Demand

rows.label: qev051003_SEL0021
rows.name: Firmly demand your reward.

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0006
rows.name:
No matter how much they shot
at or slashed it, my blade
didn't suffer a single scratch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0007
rows.name:
Fufu... That was undoubtedly
the legendary blade I dreamed
of, the Adamantine Sword![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0015
rows.name:
I came here with the completed
Adamantine Sword precisely so I could
gather the funds to pay your reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0008
rows.name:
The native creatures I hunted along the
way dropped quite a few valuable items.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0009
rows.name:
...However, after forging swords
for forty years... I realized that
I had never actually wielded one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0010
qev051003_MSG0011
rows.name:
Fufu, so how could I possibly match a ferocious
native creature like a Millepeda? It caught me
off guard and swallowed my sword whole...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0012
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0013
rows.name:
...If I've said this much,
surely someone like you
understands what it is I desire?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051003_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Exactly! Hunt down the Millepeda
that swallowed my katana, and retrieve
the Adamantine Sword immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0068
rows.name:
The Millepeda that attacked me
swallowed the Adamantine Sword whole
and slithered off somewhere...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0069
rows.name:
Now, strike the beast down
immediately and retrieve the
legendary masterwork I forged![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0070
rows.name:
I heard the agonizing cries
of a Millepeda... Don't tell
me you actually defeated it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0071
rows.name:
Ohhh! This is truly my masterwork! It
didn't suffer a single nick, even while
sitting in the stomach of a Millepeda![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0072
rows.name:
I am so glad we could be reunited like
this... Ah... As expected of my own
creation, it's simply super cool...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0073
rows.name:
Yes... After all you have done
for me, even I must express my
deepest gratitude. Let's see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0074
rows.name:
...Alright! If you'd like, why don't
you take this katana as your reward?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0075
rows.name:
I am satisfied enough just having given it physical form.
Now, it only stands to reason that a valiant warrior worthy
of this masterwork should be the one to wield it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0076
rows.name:
Yes, that would definitely be way
cooler. Well? Will you accept it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_JNK0070
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev051001_SEL0071
rows.name: Accept the Adamantine Sword.

rows.label: qev051001_JNK0080
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev051001_SEL0081
rows.name: Tell him that De Zing should be the one to keep the sword.

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0077
rows.name:
Fufu! Don't forget to thank
me every single time you draw
this blade! Now, take it, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0078
rows.name:
Heheh, what kind of cool
katana should I forge next?
My dreams are far from over![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0079
rows.name:
...What?! You're saying the one who
forged this blade has a duty to become
a warrior worthy of wielding it?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0080
rows.name:
That does make a certain
amount of sense...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0081
rows.name:
Understood... Then I shall take up
the Adamantine Sword and devote
myself to training from here on out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0082
rows.name:
Heh... I may be getting on in years,
but I'm a genius. I'll master the art
of the sword in no time at all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0083
rows.name:
Thank you, [ST:playername ]! For guiding me down
this new path! I will charge
down it without hesitation![ST:wait ]
